rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in component implementation annexes for implementation-specific bindings and assignments.
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they define input/output ranges or envelope constraints with visible identifiers.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define assumptions and guarantees in AGREE contracts.
Avoid generating clauses that depend on Boolean or opaque data types unless they are explicitly declared as AGREE bool in scope.
Preserve AADL architecture by ensuring AGREE annex content aligns with component type and implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for structural and behavioral assumptions; implementation annexes are for bindings and assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE clauses that reference Boolean or opaque data ports without confirming their numeric scalar representation in AADL.
Do not place implementation-specific assignments in component type annexes unless they are universally valid.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL component type and implementation structural extraction
